title: vitis cinerea
intro: Vitis cinerea, also known as the grayleaf grape or purpleleaf grape, is a deciduous shrub or vine native to eastern North America. The plant's leaves and fruits have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis cinerea include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to help manage conditions such as diabetes and certain types of cancer. Vitis cinerea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its extracts can also be used in pharmaceutical applications.
